en_title: Dead by Daylight the 'Most-Played Horror Game in History,' Its Developer Has Said
cn_title: 《黎明杀机》成史上最热恐怖游戏
subtitle: 十年杀机，日活百万
opus_summary: 在即将迎来10周年之际，Behaviour Interactive宣布《黎明杀机》为“史上玩家最多的恐怖游戏”，十年累计玩家超过7000万。

paragraphs.en: is “the most played horror game in history,” developer Behavior Interactive has said ahead of its 10th birthday.
paragraphs.cn: 在即将迎来10周年之际，开发商Behaviour Interactive宣称《黎明杀机》是“史上玩家最多的恐怖游戏”。

paragraphs.en: While Behavior hasn’t revealed an updated sales number for the asymmetrical 4v1 multiplayer, live service horror game, it did say it had more than 70 million players over the course of the decade, and currently averages over 1 million players a day across all platforms. Dead by Daylight is particularly strong on Steam, where it’s remained among the top 15 best-sellers for nine years.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管Behaviour并未公布这款非对称4v1多人服务型恐怖游戏的最新销量，但它确认这十年来累计玩家已超过7000万，目前全平台日均玩家超100万。《黎明杀机》在Steam上表现尤其强劲，连续九年稳居畅销榜前15。

paragraphs.en: Other contenders for the most-played horror game crown include titles in Capcom’s Resident Evil franchise, Konami’s Silent Hill series, the Five Knights at Freddy’s games, Phasmophobia, and Outlast. But it’s worth noting that Dead by Daylight’s claim to fame relates to player numbers for an individual title, not a franchise as a whole — and there aren’t many horror video games that have proven so popular over the course of 10 years to compete with it.
paragraphs.cn: 争夺“最热恐怖游戏”头衔的其他竞争者包括卡普空的《生化危机》系列、科乐美的《寂静岭》系列、《玩具熊的五夜后宫》系列、《恐鬼症》和《逃生》。但值得注意的是，《黎明杀机》的声誉是基于单一作品的玩家数量，而非整个系列——况且，也很少有恐怖游戏能在10年间保持如此高的人气与之抗衡。

paragraphs.en: And Dead by Daylight appears to be growing, with Behavior saying revenues have increased by more than 50% over the last 12 months. When Dead by daylight launched back in 2016, 30 people were working on it. Now, the team is nearly 500 strong. Behavior says it’s the largest Canadian gaming studio with more than 1,200 employees spread across its offices in Montreal, Toronto, Vancouver, Dallas, Middlesbrough and Rotterdam.
paragraphs.cn: 而且《黎明杀机》仍在增长，Behaviour表示过去12个月收入增长超过50%。2016年《黎明杀机》刚推出时，只有30人参与开发，如今团队规模已接近500人。Behaviour称其是加拿大最大的游戏工作室，在蒙特利尔、多伦多、温哥华、达拉斯、米德尔斯堡和鹿特丹的办公室拥有超1200名员工。

paragraphs.en: “When Dead by Daylight launched in 2016, it pioneered a genre: the asymmetric multiplayer horror game, where one killer faces four survivors,” Rémi Racine, Behaviour co-founder and CEO, said.
paragraphs.cn: “2016年《黎明杀机》推出时，它开创了一种品类：非对称多人恐怖游戏，由一名杀手对抗四名幸存者。” Behaviour联合创始人兼CEO Rémi Racine说道。

paragraphs.en: “Initial forecasts predicted sales of around 300,000 copies. 10 years and more than 70 million players later, I’m astounded by how the game continues to reach new heights. 2025 was Dead by Daylight’s most successful year so far. We welcomed over six million new players and delivered record performance. This growth has continued into 2026 — over the last 12 months, the game’s revenues have increased by more than 50%. For any game to endure 10 years is an achievement. To reach that milestone and still be growing is incredible. I deeply appreciate every one of the players who have supported us on this journey.”
paragraphs.cn: “最初我们预计销量约为30万份。10年后，坐拥7000多万玩家，我惊叹于游戏不断刷新高度。2025年是《黎明杀机》迄今最成功的一年，我们迎来了600多万新玩家，业绩创下纪录。这种增长势头延续到了2026年——过去12个月游戏收入增长超过50%。任何游戏能持续10年都是一种成就，达到这一里程碑且仍在增长，实在令人难以置信。我由衷感谢每一位在这段旅程中支持我们的玩家。”

paragraphs.en: Part of the reason Dead by Daylight has enjoyed such enduring appeal is its high-profile crossover events. It’s collaborated with a number of well-known horror franchises, including Alien, Five Nights at Freddy’s, Resident Evil, Friday the 13th, and Stranger Things.
paragraphs.cn: 《黎明杀机》能拥有如此长久吸引力的部分原因在于其高调的联动活动。它曾与多个知名恐怖系列合作，包括《异形》、《玩具熊的五夜后宫》、《生化危机》、《十三号星期五》和《怪奇物语》。

paragraphs.en: The announcement comes as Behaviour prepares to welcome more than 3,000 fans to Montreal for a 10-year anniversary event where the future of the game will be revealed during a livestream. It’s set for 5pm PT / 8pm ET on Sunday, June 14.
paragraphs.cn: 这一消息公布之际，Behaviour正准备在蒙特利尔迎接3000多名粉丝参加10周年庆典活动，届时将通过直播揭晓游戏的未来。直播定于太平洋时间6月14日星期日下午5点/东部时间晚上8点（北京时间6月15日上午8点）。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上 @wyp100找到他，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com以及保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系他。
